sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Dark id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
    if n['color'] == 'B':
        print(f"Black id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']} pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] <= 10:
        print(f"White id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']} pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
